name: spins-yarns-content
description: Content and craft documentation for @pavi.spins.yarns (Pavi Spins Yarns) — Instagram only. Weekly automated drop (2 Instagram posts from the Littlebird crochet brief + Perplexity trends, with Canva visual assets), one-off post drafting, crochet pattern transcription from video/web sources, project logging, and project status tracking via Notion Littlebird Log. Voice is tactile, specific, and dry — distinct from the Pavitas Productions narration brand. Absorbs the former fiber-arts-content plugin.
